title: Project 4J
description: Experience Console Edition with modern mods!
body:
![1_a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a44a38268d531680827fd438e8e0fa2546c682f.jpeg) ![2_new](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9762a2f03bc1b53d58a4a707627c661a9b510fbd.png) ![3_new](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c069bdce3325b0be241ff8197a2294bfa740f786.gif) [![4_alt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e517c91554e9e744dae11a66a166910edc67e2ae.png)](https://discord.gg/xSabG4wJ5F)

You remember Console Edition. The music. The terrain. The skin‑packs.

Now imagine that with custom mobs, new dimensions, and dungeon galore.

--- ### ✨ Main Mods & Features - 👤 **3D Skin Pack Models** – preloaded with plenty of awesome skins! - 🗺️ **Classic TU14 Terrain** – (Beta-style 1.2.5 worldgen) - 🎮 **Controller Support** – recommended to play with any controller! - 🌌 **BetterEnd Overhaul** – explore new End biomes & islands - 👹 **Exclusive Custom Enemies** - 🌐 **Free Multiplayer** thanks to [WorldHost!](https://modrinth.com/mod/world-host) - 🏰 **Expanded Dungeons** - 🐲 **Overworld Dragons** – don't worry! only attack if provoked; high risk high reward! --- ### ❓ FAQ — Quick Answers
How do I unlock more End islands? > * Respawn and defeat the Ender Dragon again > * Every new kill = unlocks 1 new island.
How do I play Multiplayer for free? - Open your world. - Press Back (controller) or H (keyboard). - Use the button displayed at the bottom left. Go Online. - Once Online, invite friends the same way! ## ONLY WORKS IF YOUR ROUTER HAS UPnP ENABLED
Where do I report bugs? - [Github](https://github.com/Cixon/project4j/issues)
Need the wiki? - [Also Github, lol](https://github.com/Cixon/project4j/wiki)
--- ### 🖥️ Server Pack Want to host your own server? 👉 [Download Server version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/p4j-server) --- ### 🙏 Special Thanks - [GallonEmilien](https://modrinth.com/user/GallonEmilien) – *Doped Horses mod* - [Blackgear](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsBlackgear) – *Stay Still AI mod* - [Jab125](https://modrinth.com/user/Jab125) – *Limited Worlds mod* - [omoso / bowen](https://modrinth.com/user/bowen) - Aided in optimizing! - [Purple_Zombie](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/purple_zombie/) – Custom mob inspiration - [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow) – *Golden Days* visual style ---
📦 Resource Pack & Mod Permissions **Golden Days RP** ➤ All rights to [PoeticRainbow](https://modrinth.com/user/PoeticRainbow) ![Golden Days Permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61999ca026ed6201bc7c3b6ea1bde5969c8f2f34.png) **Programmer Art Continuation Project (PACP)** ➤ Textures from [mzov_jen](https://modrinth.com/user/mzov_jen) ![PACP Permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/796dd3a8c113ccdeb1a757003d2c62694902d3b4.png)
📁 JAR File Permissions **staystill-1.0.0.jar** ➤ Approved by [Blackgear](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsBlackgear) ![staystill_jar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88fd14359bba507fd8d1939bc0358d3b8f1d7929.png) **limited-worlds-0.0.5.jar** ➤ Approved by [Jab125](https://modrinth.com/user/Jab125) 📜 [Permission Gist](https://gist.github.com/Jab125/1944c22abb2faa1da4723a226e03eddb) ![origin_jar_limited_worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/521d5a28a9a88c06b04dd8fde9471d38ebf07660_0.webp)
## ❤️ Support & Feedback If you enjoy the pack, leave a ❤️ or share on Tiktok/Youtube. This helps small creators like me get discovered! Thanks!
